subject: refactor(navbar): extract shared navbar partial, add touch feedback and sitemap
body:
Eliminates ~440 lines of duplicated navbar HTML across index.html and
project.html. Custom htmlPartials Vite plugin reads partials/navbar.html
and injects it at build time with {{NAV_PREFIX}} token replacement
("" for same-page anchors, "./" for cross-page).

- partials/navbar.html: single source for burger menu, theme picker,
  PWA install, random theme toggle, and Save as PDF
- vite.config.js: htmlPartials plugin with transformIndexHtml (pre-order)
- main.css: :active touch feedback on card-interactive (scale 0.98)
- public/robots.txt + sitemap.xml for SEO
- TODO.md cleaned — removed 14 intentional-tradeoff items

Tags: refactor, deduplication, mobile, seo, dx
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: audit-sweep
Semver: patch
